mapper.sql: select id, day_str, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, type_code, type_name_zh, type_name_en, type_name_ko, type_name_pt, type_name_vi, type_name_tr, type_name_tw, type_name_ja, type_name_hi, type_name_th, type_name_ru, type_name_ar, bet_amount, bet_num, bet_people_num, settle_amount, win_lose_amount, code_amount, calculations_time, create_time, update_time from t_game_type_count_order
mapper.insert:
insert into t_game_type_count_order
day_str, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, type_code, type_name_zh, type_name_en, type_name_ko, type_name_pt, type_name_vi, type_name_tr, type_name_tw, type_name_ja, type_name_hi, type_name_th, type_name_ru, type_name_ar, bet_amount, bet_num, bet_people_num, settle_amount, win_lose_amount, code_amount, calculations_time, create_time, update_time,
#{dayStr}, #{currencyId}, #{itemId}, #{chainTag}, #{typeCode}, #{typeNameZh}, #{typeNameEn}, #{typeNameKo}, #{typeNamePt}, #{typeNameVi}, #{typeNameTr}, #{typeNameTw}, #{typeNameJa}, #{typeNameHi}, #{typeNameTh}, #{typeNameRu}, #{typeNameAr}, #{betAmount}, #{betNum}, #{betPeopleNum}, #{settleAmount}, #{winLoseAmount}, #{codeAmount}, #{calculationsTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from t_game_type_count_order where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select left(day_str, 7) as dayStr , MAX(currency_id) as currencyId , MAX(item_id) as itemId , MAX(chain_tag) as chainTag , MAX(type_code) as typeCode , MAX(type_name_zh) as typeNameZh , MAX(type_name_en) as typeNameEn , MAX(type_name_ko) as typeNameKo , MAX(type_name_pt) as typeNamePt , MAX(type_name_vi) as typeNameVi , MAX(type_name_tr) as typeNameTr , MAX(type_name_tw) as typeNameTw , MAX(type_name_ja) as typeNameJa , MAX(type_name_hi) as typeNameHi , MAX(type_name_th) as typeNameTh , MAX(type_name_ru) as typeNameRu , MAX(type_name_ar) as typeNameAr , ifnull(sum(bet_amount), 0.0000) as betAmount , ifnull(sum(bet_num), 0) as betNum , ifnull(sum(bet_people_num), 0) as betPeopleNum , ifnull(sum(settle_amount), 0.0000) as settleAmount , ifnull(sum(win_lose_amount), 0.0000) as winLoseAmount , ifnull(sum(efficient_bet_amount), 0.0000) as efficientBetAmount , MAX(calculations_time) as calculationsTime , ifnull(sum(code_amount), 0) as codeAmount , MAX(create_time) as createTime , MAX(update_time) as updateTime from t_game_type_count_order where currency_id = #{currencyId} and type_code = #{typeCode} group by left(day_str, 7) having dayStr = #{dayStr}
